hero.headline: Handwoven Gear for Everyday Carry
hero.subheadline: Engineered for durability. Styled for the streets. 100% USA Made.

valueProps.title: 100% Handwoven
valueProps.description: Artisan crafted in the USA with precision

valueProps.title: Custom Tailored Fit

builderTeaser.label: The Craft
builderTeaser.headline: Mastery in Every Single Knot
builderTeaser.paragraph: Each piece is woven by hand with the same attention to detail that goes into survival gear. We source the finest materials and build everything locally.
builderTeaser.feature1Desc: Each piece is stress-tested before shipping.
builderTeaser.feature2Desc: If it unravels, we re-weave it. For free.

newsletter.headline: Join the Crew
newsletter.description: Get early access to limited edition drops and 10% off your first order.
newsletter.privacyNote: No spam, just gear. Unsubscribe anytime.

cobra.title: The Cobra Weave
cobra.description: Classic survival strap, available in 20+ colors.

hkSnapLanyard.title: HK Snap Lanyard
hkSnapLanyard.description: Quick-release lanyard for keys and gear.
